title: D Hall
compiled_truth: D Hall is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-21), D Hall sent 13 and received 202 emails, totalling 215 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (12), [Joe Gold](people/joe-gold) (2), [Gregor Baumerich](people/gregor-baumerich) (2), [Paul Mead](people/paul-mead) (2), [James New](people/james-new) (2).
